basic_details.job_title: CPPRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Pulp and Paper Research Institute (CPPRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Pulp and Paper Research Institute (CPPRI) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website cppri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CPPRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B. Tech in Agriculture Science. Preference will be given to the candidate having 8 years experience in the area of Industrial Research Projects and other Industrial R&D activities.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CPPRI Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate-I position at CPPRI is scheduled for 12 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Tech degree in Agriculture Science. Preference will be given to those with 8 years of experience in Industrial Research Projects and other R&D activities.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month, plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at the Central Pulp and Paper Research Institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this walk-in recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Central Pulp and Paper Research Institute, Saharanpur, Uttar Pradesh, 247001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for detailed information.
